import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

  {
    "accession": "ds001461",
    "bids": true,
    "dataset_label": "rsfMRI_comrobidity-SmokingandSchizophrenia",
    "diagnoses": [],

    "tasks": []
  },
  {
    "accession": "ds003011",
    "bids": true,
    "dataset_label": "Social Processes Initiative in Neurobiology of the Schizophrenia(s) Traveling Human Phantoms",
    "diagnoses": [

    ],

    "modalities": [],

    "license": "",

    ],
    "notes": "Parsed from executor summaries; verify against the OpenNeuro dataset page before downstream analysis.",
    "participant_count": 43,
    "public_download": true,
    "session_count": null,
    "source": "OpenNeuro",
    "tasks": []
  },
  {
    "accession": "ds004302",
    "bids": true,
    "dataset_label": "Brain correlates of speech perception in schizophrenia patients with and without auditory hallucinations",
    "diagnoses": [
      "Schizophrenia"
    ],
    "doi": "10.18112/openneuro.ds004302.v1.0.1",
    "license": "",
    "modalities": [
      "MRI"
    ],

      "Bipolar disorder"

      "MRI"
    ],

    "participant_count": null,
    "public_download": true,
    "session_count": null,
    "source": "OpenNeuro",
    "tasks": []
  }
]

df = pd.DataFrame(records)

def present(value):
    if value is None:
        return False
    if isinstance(value, float) and pd.isna(value):
        return False
    if isinstance(value, (list, tuple, set, dict)):
        return len(value) > 0
    return str(value).strip() != ''

def plot_binary_matrix(matrix_df, title, cmap='Blues'):
    if matrix_df.empty:
        return
    fig_w = max(7, 0.65 * len(matrix_df.columns) + 4)
    fig_h = max(3, 0.5 * len(matrix_df.index) + 2)
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(fig_w, fig_h))
    ax.imshow(matrix_df.values, cmap=cmap, aspect='auto', vmin=0, vmax=1)
    ax.set_xticks(range(len(matrix_df.columns)))
    ax.set_xticklabels(matrix_df.columns, rotation=35, ha='right')
    ax.set_yticks(range(len(matrix_df.index)))
    ax.set_yticklabels(matrix_df.index)
    ax.set_title(title)
    for i in range(matrix_df.shape[0]):
        for j in range(matrix_df.shape[1]):
            ax.text(j, i, int(matrix_df.iat[i, j]), ha='center', va='center', color='white' if matrix_df.iat[i, j] else '#475569', fontsize=9)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

def multi_hot_matrix(series):
    labels = []
    for items in series:
        if not isinstance(items, list):
            continue
        for item in items:
            if item and item not in labels:
                labels.append(item)
    if not labels:
        return pd.DataFrame(index=df['accession'].replace('', pd.NA).fillna(df['dataset_label']))
    matrix = pd.DataFrame(0, index=df['accession'].replace('', pd.NA).fillna(df['dataset_label']), columns=labels)
    for idx, items in enumerate(series):
        if not isinstance(items, list):
            continue
        row_label = matrix.index[idx]
        for item in items:
            if item in matrix.columns:
                matrix.loc[row_label, item] = 1
    return matrix

field_matrix = pd.DataFrame({
    'Participants': df['participant_count'].apply(lambda value: int(present(value))) if 'participant_count' in df.columns else 0,
    'Sessions': df['session_count'].apply(lambda value: int(present(value))) if 'session_count' in df.columns else 0,
    'Modalities': df['modalities'].apply(lambda value: int(present(value))) if 'modalities' in df.columns else 0,
    'Diagnoses': df['diagnoses'].apply(lambda value: int(present(value))) if 'diagnoses' in df.columns else 0,
    'Tasks': df['tasks'].apply(lambda value: int(present(value))) if 'tasks' in df.columns else 0,
    'Public': df['public_download'].apply(lambda value: int(present(value))) if 'public_download' in df.columns else 0,
    'License': df['license'].apply(lambda value: int(present(value))) if 'license' in df.columns else 0,
    'DOI': df['doi'].apply(lambda value: int(present(value))) if 'doi' in df.columns else 0,
    'BIDS': df['bids'].apply(lambda value: int(present(value))) if 'bids' in df.columns else 0,
}, index=df['accession'].replace('', pd.NA).fillna(df['dataset_label']))
plot_binary_matrix(field_matrix, 'Metadata field presence matrix', cmap='Blues')

if 'participant_count' in df.columns and df['participant_count'].notna().any():
    participant_df = df.dropna(subset=['participant_count']).sort_values('participant_count')
    plt.figure(figsize=(10, max(3, 0.55 * len(participant_df))))
    plt.barh(participant_df['dataset_label'], participant_df['participant_count'], color='#4C78A8')
    plt.title('Participants per dataset')
    plt.xlabel('Participant count')
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

if 'modalities' in df.columns:
    modality_matrix = multi_hot_matrix(df['modalities'])
    if not modality_matrix.empty and len(modality_matrix.columns):
        plot_binary_matrix(modality_matrix, 'Modality-by-dataset matrix', cmap='GnBu')

if 'tasks' in df.columns:
    task_matrix = multi_hot_matrix(df['tasks'])
    if not task_matrix.empty and len(task_matrix.columns):
        plot_binary_matrix(task_matrix, 'Task-by-dataset matrix', cmap='Purples')

if 'diagnoses' in df.columns:
    diagnosis_matrix = multi_hot_matrix(df['diagnoses'])
    if not diagnosis_matrix.empty and len(diagnosis_matrix.columns):
        plot_binary_matrix(diagnosis_matrix, 'Diagnosis-by-dataset matrix', cmap='Oranges')

status_matrix = pd.DataFrame({
    'Public': df['public_download'].apply(lambda value: int(present(value))) if 'public_download' in df.columns else 0,
    'BIDS': df['bids'].apply(lambda value: int(present(value))) if 'bids' in df.columns else 0,
    'DOI': df['doi'].apply(lambda value: int(present(value))) if 'doi' in df.columns else 0,
    'License': df['license'].apply(lambda value: int(present(value))) if 'license' in df.columns else 0,
}, index=df['accession'].replace('', pd.NA).fillna(df['dataset_label']))
plot_binary_matrix(status_matrix, 'Access and standards matrix', cmap='RdPu')

Detailed metadata for the six OpenNeuro datasets related to schizophrenia has been retrieved:

*   **ds001461** (rsfMRI_comrobidity-SmokingandSchizophrenia): MRI modality, 81 subjects, task: rest. DOI: 10.18112/openneuro.ds001461.v1.0.3
*   **ds003011** (Social Processes Initiative in Neurobiology of the Schizophrenia(s) Traveling Human Phantoms): MRI modality, 4 subjects, task: rest eyes closed. DOI: 10.18112/openneuro.ds003011.v1.2.3
*   **ds004000** (Fribourg Ultimatum Game in Schizophrenia Study): EEG modality, 43 subjects, study domain: Schizophrenia, task: responder. DOI: 10.18112/openneuro.ds004000.v1.0.0
*   **ds004302** (Brain correlates of speech perception in schizophrenia patients with and without auditory hallucinations): MRI modality, 71 subjects, diagnosis/status: Schizophrenia, study domain: Language, study design: Case-Control, task: speech. DOI: 10.18112/openneuro.ds004302.v1.0.1
*   **ds004837** (Magnetoencephalographic (MEG) Pitch and Duration Mismatch Negativity (MMN) in First-Episode Psychosis): MEG, MRI modalities, 60 subjects, diagnosis/status: Schizophrenia, study domain: First-episode psychosis, study design: Oddball paradigm (MMN), tasks: attnmod, p_five. DOI: 10.18112/openneuro.ds004837.v1.0.2
*   **ds005073** (The Neural Basis of Visual Shape Completion in Schizophrenia and Bipolar Disorder): MRI modality, 31 subjects, diagnosis/status: Schizophrenia, tasks: viscomp, rest. DOI: 10.18112/openneuro.ds005073.v1.0.0

These datasets include varying modalities (MRI, EEG, MEG) and focus on different aspects of schizophrenia, such as comorbidity with smoking, social processes, ultimatum game, speech perception, mismatch negativity, and visual shape completion.
